name: harness-agent-skills
description: Universal Agent Skills package for applying Harness Starter Kit workflows in coding-agent repositories.

interface.shortDescription: Repository harness workflows for coding agents.
interface.longDescription: Apply, diagnose, update, refresh, and review repository harness guidance from the Harness Starter Kit using portable Agent Skills.
defaultPrompt: Use $harness doctor to score this repository's harness.
Use $harness-adopt to apply harness engineering here.
Use $harness-review to challenge the current diff.
